title: Delete of some records don't work on Monetdb
poc: insert into test(id) SELECT ROW_NUMBER () OVER () FROM bigtable limit 20000000;
select * from test where id in (1, 20000000);
key_bug_features: Delete operation fails for specific record IDs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test(id BIGINT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test(id, name) SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (), CONCAT('Record ', ROW_NUMBER() OVER ()) FROM bigtable LIMIT 20000000;
DELETE FROM test WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
